---
id: set-conversation-marks
title: "SetConvMark"
description: "调用此接口，可为多名用户对多个会话设置或取消标记。每个会话至多可存在 30 个标记。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/conversation/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>SetConvMark</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


调用此接口，可为多名用户对多个会话设置或取消标记。每个会话至多可存在 30 个标记。

客户端将通过 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，接收会话的标记变化。

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|-------|---------|
| [conversationChanged](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onConversationChanged](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [conversationChanged](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onConversationChanged](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|--------|---------|--------------|
| [onConversationChanged](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onConversationChanged](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onConversationChanged](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onConversationChanged](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|---------|
| [OnConversationChanged](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onconversationchanged-zimeventhandler) |[groupApplicationUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupapplicationupdated-zimeventhandler) | [conversationChanged](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#conversationchanged-zimeventhandler) |  |  |

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=SetConvMark\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["SetConvMark"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"FromUserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作用户 ID（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。\n\n> **说明**\n>\n> FromUserId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 \"'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，''，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，' '，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'\"。\n","maxLength":32,"example":"user_test"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ConvMarkInfoList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>**Possible values:** `<= 100`</div><div className={"schema-description"}>会话标记的对象，每次最多 100 个，超过100或者为0报错。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"为此 UserID 的用户设置或取消会话标记。\n> **说明**\n>\n> 当目标会话为群聊时，此用户需已在群聊中。\n\n> **说明**\n>\n> UserId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 {\"'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，'-'，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，' '，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'\"}。\n","example":"userA"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>SetMarkC2c</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>SetMarkC2c 与SetMarkGroup 至少选择一个。<br/>单聊会话列表（JSON Object）。key 为会话 ID，value 为仅包含 key 为 MarkContent 的 JSON Object。列表最多可包含 100 个会话。</div><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>property name*</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"MarkContent"} required={true} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `>= 1` and `<= 30`"} schema={{"type":"number","minimum":1,"maximum":30,"description":"会话标记。取值为 [1, 30] 的整数。","example":2}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>SetMarkGroup</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>SetMarkC2c 与SetMarkGroup 至少选择一个。<br/>群聊会话列表（JSON Object）。key 为会话 ID，value 为仅包含 key 为 MarkContent 的 JSON Object。列表最多可包含 100 个会话（群聊会话需已存在，且为未被删除）。</div><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>property name*</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"MarkContent"} required={true} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `>= 1` and `<= 30`"} schema={{"type":"number","minimum":1,"maximum":30,"description":"会话标记。取值为 [1, 30] 的整数。","example":2}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Action"} required={true} schemaName={"boolean"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"boolean","description":"标记操作：\n- true：设置标记。\n- false：取消标记。\n","example":true}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n> **说明**\n>\n> 当您发起请求设置或取消多个会话的标记时：\n> <ul><li>只需成功对至少一个会话完成操作，Code 都会返回 0，表示成功。此时请参考 FailList 中的具体信息，了解失败操作详情。</li>\n> <li>如果所有会话的操作都失败，Code 会返回相关返回码，具体请参考 <a href=\"../return-codes.mdx\">全局返回码</a>。</li></ul>\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>返回码</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000001</td><td>业务类通用错误。</td><td>请重试，或联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>输入参数错误。</td><td>请检查输入的参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300005</td><td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660800001</td><td>查询用户信息出错。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660800054</td><td>对所有的会话的标记操作都失败。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求结果的说明信息。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>FailList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>会话标记失败用户列表。- Code 为 0：  - FailList 为空，为所有用户的会话标记操作都成功。  - FailList 不为空，表示为部分用户的会话标记操作失败，请参考 FailList 中的 SubCode 和 SubMessage 处理。- Code 不为 0：  - FailList 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。  - FailList 不为空，表示为全部用户的会话标记操作都失败。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"用于标识为一名用户执行会话标记操作的结果。","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubMessage"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"描述为一名用户执行会话标记操作的结果。","example":"succ"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"会话标记操作目标用户的 ID。","example":"UserA"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>FailList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>标记操作目标会话失败列表。- SubCode 为 0：  - FailList 为空，对目标用户的所有目标会话都操作成功。  - FailList 不为空，表示对目标用户的部分目标会话操作失败，请参考 FailList 中的 Code 和 Message 处理。- SubCode 不为 0：  - FailList 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。  - FailList 不为空，表示对目标用户的所有目标会话都操作失败。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"操作失败返回码。","example":1}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作失败描述。","example":"mark content is invalide"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"ConvId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"会话 ID。\n- 单聊会话：会话 ID 为用户 ID。\n- 群聊会话：会话 ID 为群组 ID。\n","example":"conv_id_1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"ConvType"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`0`, `2`]"} schema={{"type":"number","enum":[0,2],"description":"会话类型。\n- 0：单聊会话。\n- 2：群聊会话。\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"FailList\": [\n    {\n      \"SubCode\": 0,\n      \"SubMessage\": \"succ\",\n      \"UserId\": \"UserA\",\n      \"FailList\": [\n        {\n          \"Code\": 1,\n          \"Message\": \"mark content is invalide\",\n          \"ConvId\": \"conv_id_1\",\n          \"ConvType\": 0\n        },\n        {\n          \"Code\": 1,\n          \"Message\": \"mark content is invalide\",\n          \"ConvId\": \"conv_id_2\",\n          \"ConvType\": 0\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      \"SubCode\": 1,\n      \"SubMessage\": \"user not exist\",\n      \"UserId\": \"UserB\"\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
